meta.description: The Basic Education Certificate Examination (BECE) is a Junior Secondary School (JSS3) exit examination in Nigeria conducted by NECO. It certifies completion of the 9-year Basic Education programme and qualifies students for admission into Senior Secondary School (SS1). Subjects include English Studies, Mathematics, Basic Science and Technology, National Values Education, Pre-Vocational Studies, Cultural and Creative Arts, and others.

meta.seoDescription: Access free online practice tests for the Basic Education Certificate Examination (BECE). Review Math, Science, and Technology with past question simulations.
